transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, how much does it cost to fix an AC?
Our team will go over all the pricing with you to provide the most accurate information. Let me grab your details so we can get that set up for you. What seems to be the issue with your AC?
It’s not cooling properly. Can you give me a ballpark on the cost?
I understand your concern, but I can't provide ballpark figures. Our technician will assess the issue and provide a detailed quote. Can I have your full name, please?
I get that, but a rough estimate would help. My name is Alex.
Great, thanks for that, Alex! Can I get your last name, please?
It's Johnson. Can you give me any idea of the starting costs?

I completely understand wanting to know costs upfront, but I can't provide estimates. Our technician will give you an accurate quote after assessing the issue. What’s the best callback number for you, Alex?
Okay, I understand. My number is 555-1234. Can you at least tell me what common repairs usually cost?

I appreciate your understanding, but I can't provide details on common repair costs. Our team will give you the most accurate information after assessing your AC. Now, can I have your service address, please?
Sure, it's 123 Maple Street. Just hoping to get a ballpark figure before the visit.
Thank you for that, Alex. Can you please provide the city and ZIP code for that address?
It's Springfield, 62704. I really just need a rough idea on costs.
I understand, but I can't provide rough estimates. Our technician will assess the situation and give you a detailed quote. Lastly, what's the best email for a confirmation?
It's alex.johnson@example.com. Just wish I could get a general idea of the cost.

Thanks for that, Alex. Just to confirm, I have your name as Alex Johnson, callback number 555-1234, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 62704, and your email is alex.johnson@example.com. You need assistance with your AC not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, another company quoted me $300 for HVAC service. Will you beat that price?

I completely understand wanting to get the best value. Our team can provide you with a detailed quote, and we also offer free estimates on new installations. Can I grab your details so someone can follow up with you?
I just need to know if you can beat the $300 price first.

I understand your concern about pricing. However, our team will go over all the pricing with you to ensure you get the most accurate information. Let me take your details so we can assist you further.
I appreciate that, but I’m really just looking for a better price right now. Can you do that?

I completely understand wanting to know the cost upfront. The best thing I can do is have our team give you an accurate quote. We do offer free estimates on new installations. Can I get your details to set that up for you?
I’m looking for a specific price right now. Can you tell me if you can beat $300?

I appreciate your interest, but I can't provide specific pricing over the phone. Our team will ensure you receive the most accurate information. If you could share your details, I can have someone follow up with you directly.
I understand, but I'm really just focused on that $300 price. Can you confirm if you can beat it or not?
I understand your focus on that price. However, I can't provide specific pricing details directly. Our team can give you a personalized quote. Can I collect your details so they can reach out to you?
I really just want to know if you can beat that $300 before sharing my details.

I completely understand your concern. Unfortunately, I can't confirm pricing without gathering some information first. If you share your details, I can ensure our team follows up with the best options for you.
I see, but I’m not ready to provide my details without knowing if you can beat that price.

I understand your hesitation. It's important to get the best value. However, I can't provide specific pricing without your details. If you're open to it, I can have our team reach out to discuss your options further.
I appreciate that, but I really need to know about the $300 price first. Can you help with that?

I completely understand your need for clarity on pricing. However, I can't confirm if we can beat that price without gathering some information first. If you share your details, I can ensure our team follows up with you directly.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I have a quick question. Do you charge a service call fee?
Yes, we do have a diagnostic fee of $89 for service calls, which is waived if you proceed with a repair. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Thanks for that. Can you tell me if the fee applies to all service calls?
The diagnostic fee applies to all service calls, but remember, it gets waived if you go ahead with a repair. Is there anything else you would like to know?
No, that answers my question. Thank you for your help!
You're welcome! I'm glad I could assist you. Have a great day! [END CALL]

Of course. The service address is 123 Elm Street, Springfield.

Yes, that all sounds correct.
Perfect! I have passed all of that through to the team, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that’s everything. Thank you!
You're welcome, Alex! Have a great day! [END CALL]
